title: Lok Nayak Hospital Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 70 Junior Resident Posts
description: Lok Nayak Hospital has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 70 Junior Resident Posts. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the Lok Nayak Hospital Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply offline before the last date of application. If you are looking for more, ...
